message:
fix(random,conformance,ufunc): revert ziggurat RNG to match original NumPy golden values

Conformance golden values (fnp-conformance):
- Revert all distribution golden values back to the original reference values
  that match the canonical ziggurat implementation: standard_normal, normal,
  exponential, gamma, beta, chisquare, lognormal, cauchy, weibull,
  f_distribution, standard_t, power, rayleigh, pareto, wald, maxwell,
  halfnormal (228 lines of value changes)
- This reverses the golden value changes from the previous ziggurat sign-bit
  fix, restoring the original NumPy-verified reference sequences

Random (fnp-random — 22 lines):
- Adjust ziggurat sampling implementation to produce sequences matching the
  original golden values
- Fix sign/shift bit extraction to be consistent with the reference sequences

ufunc (fnp-ufunc — 75 lines):
- Code quality improvements and refactoring in ufunc operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
